author: kai
description: Resolution Algorithm (RA-1) created. Replaces patchwork fixing with closed-loop: recall → identify → root cause → tasks → execute → verify → simulate → report → memory → close. Mandatory for all agents. Self-evolving via process improvements in every resolution report.
changes: Created RESOLUTION_ALGORITHM.md
Created resolve.sh executor
Created recall.py search tool
Added RA-1 section to AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md
Added recall to Kai startup sequence
Added auto-remediation standard: detection without remediation is incomplete

author: kai
description: Two improvements applied from first resolution: (1) STEP 3 pre-check: for every detection task, confirm a remediation task exists. (2) STEP 5 addition: verify system can self-heal without human intervention — session-dependent fixes are incomplete.
changes: RESOLUTION_ALGORITHM.md STEP 3: added detection-remediation pre-check
RESOLUTION_ALGORITHM.md STEP 5: added self-heal verification requirement

author: kai
description: SELF-EVOLUTION CYCLE expanded from 11 to 12 steps. New step 10: AGENT REFLECTION — 6 mandatory questions every agent asks after every cycle. Questions focus on bottlenecks, symptom-vs-system, artifact liveness, domain growth, knowledge persistence, and reflection quality. Evolution entries (step 11) now MUST include reflection answers, not just metrics. The reflection loop itself evolves — agents add new questions to PLAYBOOK.md 'Reflection Extensions' and propose them for the constitution. This is the shift from agents-as-runners to agents-as-autonomous-domain-experts. Kai's POST-TASK REFLECTION (added same session) mirrors this at the CEO level.
changes: AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md SELF-EVOLUTION CYCLE: added step 10 (AGENT REFLECTION) with 6 sub-questions
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md SELF-EVOLUTION CYCLE: renumbered steps 10-11 to 11-12
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md SELF-EVOLUTION CYCLE step 11: evolution entry must include reflection answers
Reflection loop is self-evolving via PLAYBOOK.md extensions
Parallels Kai POST-TASK REFLECTION but framed for agent autonomy

author: kai
description: AUTONOMY MODEL v3: agents decide for themselves, report to Kai for memory/tracking. No permission gates except cross-agent/spending/constitution. KAI GUIDANCE PROTOCOL: Kai mentors with questions (the Hyo model). Dead-loop detection automated in healthcheck Check 8 (3x same assessment/bottleneck/stagnant → guidance question). EVENT-DRIVEN TRIGGERS: dispatch queues agent runner on P0/P1 flag (minutes not hours). ALGORITHM EVOLUTION LIFECYCLE: 6 triggers, proposal mechanism, review cycle, verification + simulation required. Open-ended + yes/no question framework added to REASONING_FRAMEWORK.md.
changes: AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: AUTONOMY MODEL rewritten
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: KAI GUIDANCE PROTOCOL (replaces KAI OVERRIDE PROTOCOL)
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: ALGORITHM EVOLUTION LIFECYCLE section added
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: dead-loop detection definition + response
bin/dispatch.sh: event-driven agent runner queueing on P0/P1
kai/queue/healthcheck.sh: Check 7 (stale proposals) + Check 8 (dead-loop)
kai/protocols/agent-gates.sh: file_proposal() helper
kai/protocols/REASONING_FRAMEWORK.md: open-ended + yes/no question types
kai/proposals/ directory created

author: kai
description: POST-TASK REFLECTION expanded from 6→7 questions. AGENT REFLECTION expanded from 6→7 questions. New question (both): 'Did this change how the system operates? Did ALL governing docs get updated?' Specifically checks CLAUDE.md (session bootstrap), AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md (constitution), REASONING_FRAMEWORK.md, and agent PLAYBOOKs. End-of-session checklist in CLAUDE.md now includes propagation check as step 4. Triggered by Hyo catching that CLAUDE.md was not updated after constitutional v3.0.
changes: AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: Kai POST-TASK REFLECTION: question 6 (propagation check) added, renumbered 6→7
AGENT_ALGORITHMS.md: AGENT REFLECTION step 10: question f (propagation check) added, renumbered f→g
CLAUDE.md: end-of-session checklist step 4 (propagation check) added
CLAUDE.md: operating rules updated to match v3 autonomy model
CLAUDE.md: project layout updated with kai/proposals, kai/protocols, kai/ledger
known-issues.jsonl: governance-propagation-gap P0 pattern logged

author: kai
description: AGENT_CREATION_PROTOCOL.md updated to v2.0. Hyo caught that creation protocol was not updated after constitutional v3.0 — same class as governance-propagation-gap. v2.0 adds: PLAYBOOK.md + evolution.jsonl to file structure, self-review + reflection to runner template, section 6.5 (Agent Autonomy & Growth), 11-point testing (from 8), reflection monitoring in post-creation, F9/F10 failure catalog entries. CLAUDE.md now references the creation protocol and includes it in the propagation checklist. Core learning: dependency tracing applies to documents, not just code. Documents have consumers. When a document changes, check all consumers.
changes: docs/AGENT_CREATION_PROTOCOL.md: v1.0 → v2.0
CLAUDE.md: added creation protocol reference + checklist entry
KAI_TASKS.md: updated done entry to v2.0
